Title: Successful User Registration
Preconditions: User has an Android device with internet access, app is installed
Test Data: Valid email (e.g., test@example.com), strong password (e.g., P@ssw0rd!), full name (e.g., John Doe)
Test Steps:
1. Open the app and navigate to the registration screen.
2. Enter the full name in the "Name" field.
3. Enter a valid email address in the "Email" field.
4. Enter a strong password in the "Password" field.
5. Re-enter the same password in the "Confirm Password" field.
6. Click the "Register" button.
Expected Result:
User account is created successfully, and the user is redirected to the login screen with a confirmation message (e.g., "Registration successful. Please log in.").
--

Title: Failed User Registration with Weak Password
Preconditions: User has an Android device with internet access, app is installed
Test Data: Valid email (e.g., test@example.com), weak password (e.g., 12345), full name (e.g., John Doe)
Test Steps:
1. Open the app and navigate to the registration screen.
2. Enter the full name in the "Name" field.
3. Enter a valid email address in the "Email" field.
4. Enter a weak password in the "Password" field.
5. Re-enter the same weak password in the "Confirm Password" field.
6. Click the "Register" button.
Expected Result:
Registration fails, and an error message appears (e.g., "Password must be at least 8 characters long and include uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character.").
--

Title: Successful User Login
Preconditions: User is registered and has valid credentials
Test Data: Registered email (e.g., test@example.com), correct password (e.g., P@ssw0rd!)
Test Steps:
1. Open the app and navigate to the login screen.
2. Enter the registered email in the "Email" field.
3. Enter the correct password in the "Password" field.
4. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result:
User is logged in successfully and redirected to the home screen with their profile name displayed.
--

Title: Failed User Login with Incorrect Password
Preconditions: User is registered
Test Data: Registered email (e.g., test@example.com), incorrect password (e.g., WrongPass)
Test Steps:
1. Open the app and navigate to the login screen.
2. Enter the registered email in the "Email" field.
3. Enter an incorrect password in the "Password" field.
4. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result:
Login fails, and an error message appears (e.g., "Invalid email or password.").
--

Title: Add a New Announcement
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Data: Title (e.g., "Community Cleanup"), description (e.g., "Join us for a cleanup event on Saturday"), date (e.g., 2024-11-01), location (e.g., "Central Park"), category (e.g., "Cleanup")
Test Steps:
1. Logged-in user navigates to the "Add Announcement" screen.
2. Enters the title in the "Title" field.
3. Enters the description in the "Description" field.
4. Selects the date from the calendar picker.
5. Enters the location in the "Location" field.
6. Selects the category from the dropdown menu.
7. Clicks the "Post Announcement" button.
Expected Result:
Announcement is published successfully, and the user is redirected to the announcement feed with a confirmation message (e.g., "Announcement posted successfully!").
--

Title: Participate in an Announcement Event
Preconditions: User is logged in, at least one announcement exists
Test Data: Existing announcement (e.g., "Community Cleanup")
Test Steps:
1. Logged-in user navigates to the announcement feed.
2. Selects an existing announcement to view details.
3. Clicks the "Participate" button.
Expected Result:
User’s participation is recorded, and a confirmation message appears (e.g., "You have successfully joined the event!").
--

Title: Modify User Profile
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Data: Updated full name (e.g., "Johnathan Doe"), updated bio (e.g., "Environmental enthusiast")
Test Steps:
1. Logged-in user navigates to the profile screen.
2. Clicks the "Edit Profile" button.
3. Updates the full name in the "Name" field.
4. Enters or updates a bio in the "Bio" field.
5. Clicks the "Save Changes" button.
Expected Result:
Profile is updated successfully, and changes are reflected on the profile screen with a confirmation message (e.g., "Profile updated successfully!").
--

Title: View and Modify Own Announcement
Preconditions: User is logged in, user has posted at least one announcement
Test Data: Existing announcement (e.g., "Community Cleanup"), updated title (e.g., "Updated Community Cleanup"), updated description (e.g., "Event rescheduled to Sunday")
Test Steps:
1. Logged-in user navigates to the announcement feed.
2. Selects their own announcement to view details.
3. Clicks the "Edit" button.
4. Updates the title and description.
5. Clicks the "Save Changes" button.
Expected Result:
Announcement is updated successfully, and changes are reflected in the feed with a confirmation message (e.g., "Announcement updated successfully!").
--

Title: First-time user registration flow
Preconditions: Application is installed and launched for the first time
Test Data: Valid user data (name, email, password, phone)
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application for the first time
2. Navigate to the registration screen automatically displayed
3. Fill in all required fields with valid test data
4. Submit the registration form
Expected Result: New user account is created in the database, and the user gains access to app functionalities

Title: Modify user profile information
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the profile viewing screen
Test Data: Updated email and phone number
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the profile modification section within the profile viewing screen
2. Enter new email and phone number
3. Submit changes
Expected Result: Profile information is updated in the database with the new email and phone number

Title: Create a Standard Announcement
Preconditions: User has logged into their profile
Test Data: Valid announcement details (title, description, optional customization)
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the announcement creation section.
2. User presses the designated icon to create an announcement.
3. User fills in the required fields (title, description).
4. User submits the form.
Expected Result: Announcement is saved in the database and becomes visible to other users in the app.

Title: Create a Special Event Announcement
Preconditions: User has logged into their profile
Test Data: Valid event details (title, description, event-specific fields)
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the announcement creation section.
2. User selects the option to create a special event announcement.
3. User fills in the required fields (title, description, event details).
4. User submits the form.
Expected Result: Event announcement is saved in the database and becomes visible to other users in the app.

Title: Modify an Existing Announcement
Preconditions: User has logged into their profile and has at least one published announcement
Test Data: Updated announcement details (title, description, or other customizable fields)
Test Steps:
1. User views their list of published announcements.
2. User clicks the modification icon next to the announcement they want to edit.
3. User updates the announcement details.
4. User saves the changes.
Expected Result: Announcement details in the database are updated, and changes are reflected in the app.

Title: New User Registration
Preconditions: Application is opened for the first time by a new user
Test Data: Valid email, password, name, and other required registration fields
Test Steps:
1. Open the application for the first time.
2. Navigate to the registration screen (if prompted automatically).
3. Fill in the registration form with valid data (email, password, name, etc.).
4. Submit the registration form.
Expected Result: A new user account is successfully created, and the user is redirected to the login screen or home screen.

Title: Successful User Login
Preconditions: User account is already registered in the system
Test Data: Valid username/email and password
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login screen.
2. Enter the registered email/username and correct password.
3. Click the login button.
Expected Result: User is successfully logged in and redirected to their profile or home screen.

Title: Failed User Login with Incorrect Credentials
Preconditions: User account is already registered in the system
Test Data: Registered email/username and incorrect password
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login screen.
2. Enter the registered email/username and incorrect password.
3. Click the login button.
Expected Result: System displays an error message indicating invalid credentials and does not grant access.

Title: View Own Profile
Preconditions: User is logged in to the application
Test Data: None
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the application.
2. Navigate to the profile section.
3. View the displayed profile information.
Expected Result: User’s profile is displayed correctly, including all relevant details (e.g., name, email, and other stored information).

Title: Modify User Profile Data
Preconditions: User is logged in to the application.
Test Data: Valid user credentials, updated profile data (e.g., name, email, or other editable fields).
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the profile section of the application.
2. Select the option to edit profile data.
3. Update one or more fields (e.g., name, email).
4. Confirm the changes by selecting the "Save" or "Update" button.
Expected Result: The updated profile data is saved successfully, and the user sees a confirmation message or the updated data reflected in the profile.

Title: Create an Announcement
Preconditions: User is logged in to the application.
Test Data: Valid announcement details (e.g., title, description, type such as event, date/time if applicable).
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the section for creating announcements.
2. Select the option to create a new announcement.
3. Fill in the required fields (e.g., title, description, type).
4. Select the "Create" or "Post" button.
Expected Result: The announcement is created successfully, and the user sees a confirmation message or the newly created announcement in their list.

Title: View Announcements by Other Users
Preconditions: At least one announcement exists in the system created by another user.
Test Data: None (system-generated or pre-existing announcements).
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the section for viewing announcements.
2. Browse through the list of announcements.
3. Select an announcement created by another user.
Expected Result: The selected announcement is displayed with all its details (e.g., title, description, creator info).

Title: Log Out from Application
Preconditions: User is logged in to the application.
Test Data: None.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the logout option in the application.
2. Select the "Log Out" button or option.
Expected Result: The user is successfully logged out, and the application redirects to the login screen or home screen without the user's profile data visible.

Title: User Account Creation on First Launch
Preconditions: User opens the application for the first time; no existing account on the device/app
Test Data: Valid email, strong password, username (unique), profile details (optional)
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application for the first time.
2. Select the option to create a new account.
3. Enter a valid email address in the email field.
4. Enter a strong password in the password field.
5. Confirm the password in the confirm password field.
6. Enter a unique username in the username field.
7. Optionally fill in profile details (name, bio, etc.).
8. Click the "Register" or "Create Account" button.
Expected Result: Account is successfully created; user is redirected to the application’s main navigation screen with access to all features.

Title: Navigation After Account Creation
Preconditions: User has successfully created an account in the application
Test Data: None
Test Steps:
1. User completes account registration as per TC-ACCOUNT_CREATION-001.
2. Observe the application’s current screen after registration.
Expected Result: User is automatically navigated to the application’s main screen/homepage, allowing access to all available features.

Title: Application Compatibility with Minimum Android Version
Preconditions: None
Test Data: Android 8.1 emulator/device with 1GB RAM and 300MB storage
Test Steps:
1. Install the application on an Android 8.1 device/emulator with 1GB RAM and 300MB storage.
2. Launch the application.
Expected Result: Application installs and launches without errors; all basic functionalities are accessible.

Title: Application Requires Stable Internet Connection
Preconditions: Application is installed and launched
Test Data: Device with no active internet connection
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application on a device with no active internet connection.
2. Attempt to perform any action requiring network access (e.g., login, post creation, navigation to social features).
Expected Result: Application displays an error message indicating the need for a stable internet connection; critical actions are blocked until connectivity is restored.

Title: Data Removal After Uninstallation
Preconditions: User has installed the application and created an account; application data is stored locally
Test Data: None
Test Steps: 1. User uninstalls the application from the device.
Expected Result: All application-related data (user data, cache, etc.) is permanently removed from the device’s storage. No residual data from the application remains.
